name: sylabys-syllabus-checker
description: Sylabys syllabus audit plugin. Aliases: @sylabys-syllabus-checker. When this plugin is mentioned, run the plugin-only /check-syllabus workflow: prepare extraction, spawn six real Codex subagents for STR, FMT, OP, RUP, INT and TXT, wait for all, then write the human-readable Russian audit PDF. Do not invoke bundled skills. If Codex subagents are unavailable or workspace credits are exhausted, stop and report that blocker instead of using a non-subagent fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Plugin-only syllabus audit through six Codex subagents.
interface.longDescription: Use @sylabys-syllabus-checker to audit a syllabus as a plugin workflow. The orchestrator must run /check-syllabus, spawn six real Codex subagents, collect suite JSON reports, and generate final-report.pdf in Russian with corrections, evidence, levels of correction, literature notes, final-control form and exam questions.
